name: HealBoost
description: Calculates healing boost multipliers from perks, levels, emotional state, darkness, draconic infusions, and Anti Heal debuffs. Returns a final multiplier and per-source breakdown.
responsibilities: Define HealBoostContext and HealBoostResult interfaces
Calculate level-based healing scaling (1.25% per level up to MAX_LEVEL)
Compute per-perk healing multipliers (Heal Boost, Emotional, Oceans Rage)
Handle Vampire sunlight healing reduction
Handle Frenzy self-heal reduction during Rage
Compute Holy Infusion draconic healing bonus
Apply Anti Heal self-debuff reduction
Deduplicate boost entries via Map

name: mountRunes
description: Defines mount rune stat definitions including M1 base damage, Weapon Art hits, damage types, and scalings for Winter Woof, Slizard, and Glacial Snapper mounts.
responsibilities: Define MountRuneM1Def, MountRuneWADef, and MountRuneDef interfaces
Declare M1 and WA damage stats for each mount rune
Map damage types and stat scalings per mount
Provide lookup function for mount rune definitions by name

name: perkAutoDebuffs
description: Computes automatic debuffs (Burn, Bleed, Poison, Anti Heal, Slowness, Weakness, Hypnotized) granted by perks on hit, accounting for existing debuffs and proc coefficients.
responsibilities: Calculate actual HP fill percentage adjusted for protection
Determine Exhaust-to-Burn conversion
Apply Penance bleed on low HP
Apply Melting Shred Anti Heal during DoTs
Apply Fungal Prototype, Venom Spitter, Toxin Caster poison
Apply Gorecast bleed on magic/physical hits
Apply Bellowing Ember burn at HP threshold
Apply Frostbite slowness and Gelid Lance bleed chain
Apply Weakening weakness and Sunburn burn on Holy
Apply Fiery Pursuit burn and Hypnotist debuff
Delegate to enemyHpEffects for HP-gated debuffs

name: Perkbasedmg
description: Defines all perk-based damage source definitions including base damage formulas, hit counts, damage types, stat scalings, HP gates, secondary effects, and trigger chains for 30+ perks.
responsibilities: Define PerkDmgCtx, PerkDmgDef, HpGate, SecondaryEffect, TriggerChainEntry interfaces
Implement HP gate threshold logic with always-active overrides

Define damage definitions for Springblast, Spirit variants, Bounce Momentum, Bomber Charge, Dragon abilities, Roaring Heads, Barbed Flurry, Honey Arts, Sickness, Melting Slime, Whirlwind, Dragon State, Volatile Shell, Spore Burst, Royal Finisher, Grounded Despair, Echo Incineration, Bombardier, Venom Spitter, Cauterize, Steam Charge, Quarry, Wind Drill, Fiery Pursuit, Bulfrogg/Gremlin/Queen Bumblz spirits
Provide helper functions for Springblast and Bomber Charge base damage calculation
Define secondary effect color mapping

name: procCoefficients
description: Stores proc coefficient lookup tables for all weapon types (M1 and M2), weapon arts, runes, and perks, used to determine whether on-hit effects can trigger.
responsibilities: Define per-weapon M1/M2 proc coefficients
Define weapon art proc coefficients
Define rune proc coefficients
Define perk proc coefficients
Provide default fallback proc coefficients

name: raceEffects
description: Defines race-specific conditional effects such as Human's below-50%-HP damage boost and DR, and Ork's Tenacity bonus from active buffs.
responsibilities: Define RaceConditionalEffect interface
Declare Human race passive (1.2x dmg, 20% flat DR below 50% HP)
Provide getActiveRaceEffect lookup by race and HP percentage
Implement Ork Tenacity buff counting (10% per buff)
Provide calcOrkTenacityBonus computation

name: Runebasedmg
description: Defines rune-based damage definitions including base damage, damage types, stat scalings, hit counts, sliders, shield mechanics, and heal-only modes for 12 rune types.
responsibilities: Define RuneDmgCtx, RuneSliderDef, RuneShieldDef, RuneDmgDef interfaces
Implement heal-scaling integration with HealBoost
Define rune damage for Ancient Cleric, Beenade, Boostshroom, Thunderous Charge, Sporeling Toss, Foot Dive, Caci, Cacitrops, Hex Web, Brainblast, Fireball, Rocky Tail
Implement Rocky Tail dynamic hit count based on protection stat

name: selfDamagePerks
description: Defines perks that deal self-damage (Undead Might, Explosive Charge, Dark Magic, Bombardier) and calculates self-damage with harmonic-series multi-target falloff.
responsibilities: Define SelfDamagePerkDef interface
Declare self-damage definitions with damage type splits and DR per stack
Implement calcSelfDamage with DR reduction and multi-target harmonic falloff
Apply defense multipliers per damage type

name: stanceOverlays
description: Resolves stance overlay weapon types when certain perks or ring combinations are active, determining which alternative M2 or alternate weapon type to use.
responsibilities: Define StanceOverlayResult and StanceOverlayCtx interfaces
Resolve Blaster Ring overlays (Rifle for Fists, Shotgun for weapons)
Resolve Locked And Loaded overlays (Dual Guns for Fists, Side Gun for weapons)
Resolve Cosmic Ray and Mine weapon overlays
Return first matching overlay via priority order

name: statboost
description: Applies stat-boosting perks that modify character stats based on other stats (e.g., Quick Witted converts Speed to Dex, Carapace converts Earth to Protection) in a fixed execution order.
responsibilities: Define OFFENSIVE_BOOSTS stat key list

Implement perk handlers for Roaring Heads, Lucky, Quick Witted, Whirl Foot, Carapace, Extra Layers, Frozen Heart, Immovable, Righted Wrongs, Rocky Body, Spellshield, Strong Tides, Swift Guard, True Balance, Brawny, Weight Distribution
Execute perk stat transformations in defined order
Apply final rounding for percent stats

name: SummonData
description: Calculates summon stat scaling, maximum summon count, and defines summon creature data (Mage Bomber, Blessedling) with their attacks and stats.
responsibilities: Calculate summon stat scaling with Summon Boost and level
Compute max summon count from Swarm perk
Define summon creature data with base damage and attacks
Map WA summon names to creature definitions

name: TypedDmgBoost
description: Calculates damage and heal multipliers for specific damage types from active buffs and perks (Glyph Conduit for magic, Rage with expanding types, Photosynthesis in sunlight, Hex Shield Converted Energy).
responsibilities: Define TypedDmgBoostDef with buff/perk-driven potency
Calculate per-type damage multipliers from Glyph Conduit, Rage, Photosynthesis, Hex Shield
Expand Rage-affected types based on Mage Rage, Oceans Rage, Scourge, Cursed Experiment perks
Aggregate multipliers multiplicatively per damage type
Compute overall heal multiplier

name: weapon base dmg
description: Defines the base M1/M2 damage values and hit patterns for all 30+ weapon types in the game, including multi-hit attacks and Rifle charge mechanics.
responsibilities: Define WEAPON_BASE_DMG array with per-weapon M1 and M2 base damage
Support multi-hit patterns using {n, count} notation
Support m1Finisher flag per weapon
Define Rifle m2Charge formula with charge scaling

name: Weaponartcheck
description: Validates whether a player's current weapon type, scaling stats, and character stats meet the requirements to equip a given Weapon Art, and lists unmet requirements.
responsibilities: Define scaling key to stat key mapping
Check at-least-one-scaling requirement
Check all scaling requirements
Check stat requirements (defense, boost, resistance, tenacity)
Check weapon type and guild requirements
Check bothParts requirement for dual-component WAs
Generate human-readable unmet requirement strings

name: weaponArts
description: Defines all Weapon Art definitions including names, descriptions, cooldowns, base damage strings, hit types, requirements, and special properties for 40+ weapon arts.
responsibilities: Define WAIndividualHit, WeaponArtRequirement, WeaponArt interfaces
Declare all weapon arts with their damage formulas and requirements
Support per-hit damage types and scalings
Support Monk-specific and summoning weapon arts
Define weapon type restrictions and scaling requirements

name: weaponConditionalBoosts
description: Calculates conditional damage multipliers for perks that only apply to specific weapon types and hit scopes (e.g., Aggressive Personality on M1 Finisher/M2 for mallet weapons).
responsibilities: Define WeaponConditionalBoost interface
Map perks to weapon-type and hit-scope conditions
Calculate multiplicative boost per matching perk and weapon type
Return combined multiplier and activated perk labels

name: DidYouMean
description: Displays 'Did you mean?' suggestion chips when a search returns no exact results, showing fuzzy-matched names and perks with highlighted matching text.
responsibilities: Show suggestion chips when noExactResults is true
Differentiate perk-type suggestions with icon styling
Highlight matching text parts in suggestion labels
Dispatch 'select' event when a suggestion is clicked

name: DmgTotalTooltip
description: Renders a damage breakdown tooltip showing an animated pie chart of damage type distribution with per-entry detail rows and badge tags.
responsibilities: Group computed hit damage by type with totals
Render animated SVG pie chart of damage proportions
Show per-entry damage values with badge labels
Handle crit vs raw damage display
Animate pie chart entry on mount

name: DraconicAbilityStats
description: Displays draconic ability stat rows including damage type, scaling, poise damage, and conditional holy/water healing values with color-coded styling.
responsibilities: Show damage type and scaling with draconic color
Show poise damage value
Conditionally show Holy or Water heal values
Display Cleanses note for Water heal

name: EmotionalTracker
description: Provides an interactive emotional state selector with three modes (Buff only, Debuff only, Both) using buttons and a slider, persisted to the build store.
responsibilities: Map between store values and UI state
Render three quick-select buttons with active styling
Render a custom slider with segmented visual track
Show dot indicators for current position
Update build store emotional state on interaction

name: Highlight
description: A minimal component that wraps text with highlighted matching segments from a search query using the highlightTextParts utility.
responsibilities: Split text into highlighted and non-highlighted parts
Render matching segments with <mark> tags

name: LevelBar
description: An interactive level and HP bar component with click-to-edit level, draggable HP fill, shield overlay, lost HP zone, threshold line, and protection badge display.
responsibilities: Display and edit player level (click to edit, keyboard support)
Calculate base max HP from level and effective max HP from protection
Render draggable HP fill bar with color-coded states
Show shield overlay (positive protection) and lost zone (negative protection)
Show HP threshold line for gated effects
Persist level and HP fill to localStorage
Display current/max HP and protection badge

name: AppHeader
description: Application header with the VoxlBuilder branding, build saves dropdown, and Overview/Analyze tab navigation with animated sliding bubble indicator.
responsibilities: Render app title and hint text
Render BuildSaves component
Implement animated tab switching bubble
Dispatch switchTab events for Overview and Animate tabs
Handle resize recalculation for bubble position

name: constants (re-export)
description: Barrel re-export file that forwards all exports from the constants/index module.
responsibilities: Re-export all constants from ./constants/index

name: boosts constants
description: Defines numeric constants for damage and healing boost calculations including Frenzy, Blood Thirsty, Venom Spitter, Perfection, Stealth, Golden Crits, Scourge, Emotional, Heal Boost, Vampire, and many more.
responsibilities: Define Frenzy base and rage multiplier constants
Define Minion absorption multiplier
Define Venom Eater and Siphonning Rot heal per stack
Define Holy Infusion potency multiplier
Define Bellowing Ember base/fire multipliers
Define 20+ simple multiplier-per-stack constants
Define complex boost internal constants (Ferocity, Spirit Winds, Guardian Spin, etc.)
